name: agent_task_data_retrieve
description: Retrieve task-specific data from agent memory with filtering and search capabilities. Use this to get previously stored code snippets, API responses, research findings, or any information stored during task execution.

task_id.description: The task ID to retrieve data for. Must match the current task being worked on.

data_key.description: Specific data key to retrieve (optional). If not provided, returns all data for the task.

data_type.description: Filter by data type (optional). If not provided, returns all types.

priority.description: Filter by priority level (optional). If not provided, returns all priorities.

step_filter.description: Filter by the step where data was gathered (optional). If not provided, returns data from all steps.

search_query.description: Search for data entries containing this text in content, future_use, or metadata (optional).

limit.description: Maximum number of data entries to return (default: 10).

include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata in the response (default: true).
